data.title: Hockey Legend and BC High Alumnus Mike Sullivan Brings Home Milano-Cortina 2026 Gold
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Boston, Rocket Alumni Solutions, a top touchscreen software provider, celebrated Mike Sullivan '86, a Boston College High School (BC High) graduate. Sullivan led the USA Olympic Men's Hockey Team to a gold medal at the Milano-Cortina 2026 Olympics.

data.title: Green Rain Energy (OTCID: GREH) Announces Review of Legacy Convertible Notes and Strengthened Shareholder Protections
data.description: Green Rain Energy (OTCID: GREH) has disclosed a plan to evaluate its past convertible notes alongside enhancing safeguards for shareholders. This move comes amidst escalating concerns and the need for transparency and protection for investors. The company will be assessing the convertible notes issued previously, with a close eye on improving shareholder protections. This initiative aims to fortify the rights and interests of shareholders, ensuring a more secure investment environment. The review will closely examine the terms and conditions of these legacy convertible notes to identify any potential risks or inconsistencies. Shareholders can anticipate increased clarity and protective measures, which should bolster confidence in the company. The evaluation process is part of an overarching strategy to prioritize shareholder welfare and address any looming uncertainties regarding past financial instruments. Green Rain Energy affirms its commitment to transparency and accountability by proactively addressing these concerns and reinforcing shareholder safeguards.

data.title: Novartis Cosentyx® receives FDA approval for pediatric patients aged 12+ with moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Novartis revealed that the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has granted approval for the use of Cosentyx ® (secukinumab) in the treatment of moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) in pediatric patients aged 12 and above. This approval positions Cosentyx as the sole IL-17A inhibitor available for this demographic. The introduction of this distinct biologic option for pediatric HS patients signifies a shift towards personalized treatment and solidifies Cosentyx as a valuable asset in the realm of HS treatment (Source: Novartis).

data.title: Statement from Attorney Howard Hershenhorn on Arraignment of Driver Charged in DWI Crash That Killed Nassau County Police Officer Patricia Espinosa
data.description: In Mineola, New York on March 13, 2026, Matthew Smith was arraigned on escalated charges stemming from a drunk-driving incident. The charges include aggravated vehicular homicide, vehicular manslaughter, and aggravated vehicular assault. These charges are in relation to a fatal crash that resulted in the death of Nassau County Police personnel.

data.title: Oil supply shock comparable to 1973 embargo with governments stockpiling and more efficient cars, but no end in sight. #globalcrisis
data.description: Countries around the world have accumulated significant oil reserves, while advancements in vehicle technology have led to increased fuel efficiency. However, the current supply disruption is being felt on a global scale, with no clear indication of when it will resolve.

data.title: Restore. Refuel. Refresh: Javvy Coffee Debuts a New Category With Clear Protein Refreshers
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Los Angeles, Javvy Coffee, known for its range of convenient, functional, and delicious beverages, is introducing an innovative addition to its protein product line. The all-new Clear Protein Refreshers are set to hit the shelves, offering consumers a refreshing way to boost their protein intake. This latest launch signifies a significant development for the brand, providing a new option for health-conscious individuals looking for convenient and tasty protein sources.
